name: White Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and shortening.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs.
4. Sift together flour, nutmeg, and cinnamon; stir into creamed mixture (dough should be stiff).
5. Store in a covered bowl in the refrigerator overnight.
6. Roll dough very thin using a floured pastry cloth on a board and rolling pin.
7. Cut into star shapes.
8. Place cookies 1 to 1 1/2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until crisp and straw-colored.
10. Remove from baking sheets and cool on racks.
